title: Mewing & Rizz
description: Adds a Gigachad villager who sells mewing totems and helps make rizz potions.
body:
### **Mewing and Rizz Mod**

Dive into a unique dimension of Minecraft with the Mewing and Rizz Mod. This expansion introduces the **Gigachad**, a new profession within the villager community, with the **jukebox** serving as their workstation.

---

### **Meet the Gigachad**

![A Gigachad villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e47a22b173a947f76f453f28c8ea2ff10a6b9cd.png)

The Gigachad is not your average villager. With exclusive trades and unique items, the Gigachad brings a new level of depth to your trading experience.

---

### **Exclusive Trades**

![Gigachad villager trading a Totem of Mewing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36276f7a1a3ce553d94c2b686e61820469c77555.png)
![Gigachad villager trading an Essence of Rizz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2824fdb35035ff34244577f5d3c73e47992056bd.png)

The Gigachad offers exclusive trades not found elsewhere. Obtain the **Totem of Mewing** and the **Essence of Rizz** directly from the Gigachad.

---

### **Crafting and Brewing**

![potion recipe for Potion of Rizz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d754a8ba5c4d1ee2119d9913c32933d1e1874e43.png)

Use the Totem of Mewing to craft **Mewing Armor**, providing unique benefits to the player. The Essence of Rizz can be transformed into a **Potion of Rizz** using a brewing stand, adding a new layer of strategy to your gameplay.

---

### **Enhanced Gameplay**

The Mewing and Rizz Mod adds a new layer of strategy and depth to your gameplay, encouraging exploration of new crafting and brewing possibilities. Become the ultimate Gigachad in this unique Minecraft mod.
